xanesnet.models.e3ee package¶

E3EE: absorber-centred E3-equivariant model.

class xanesnet.models.e3ee.E3EE(model_type, out_size, max_z, atom_emb_dim, atom_hidden_dim, atom_layers, local_cutoff, rbf_dim, energy_rbf_dim, scatter_dim, latent_dim, head_hidden_dim, e3nn_irreps, e3nn_irreps_message, e3nn_lmax, out_mlp_layers, use_invariant_branch, use_attention_branch, use_equivariant_branch, use_eq_attention_branch, use_conv_branch, use_eq_conv_branch, use_path_branch, residual_scale_init, attention_heads, attention_rbf_dim, attention_lmax, attention_irreps, att_cutoff, conv_use_gate=True, fusion_mode='cat')[source]¶

Bases: Model

Absorber-centred E3-equivariant model. Architecture: - Equivariant atom encoder (e3nn spherical harmonics message passing) - Branch 1 (optional): invariant absorber features + energy - Branch 2a (optional): energy-conditioned atom attention - Branch 2b (optional): energy-conditioned equivariant atom attention - Branch 2c (optional): energy-conditioned invariant convolution (SchNet/PaiNN-style) - Branch 2d (optional): energy-conditioned equivariant convolution (NequIP/MACE-style) - Branch 3 (optional): late equivariant absorber head - Branch 4 (optional): 3-body path scattering

Each optional branch produces a (B, nE, latent_dim) tensor. Active branches are fused according to fusion_mode: "cat" concatenates them before the final MLP head, while "gated" combines them with an energy-conditioned GatedBranchFusion before the final MLP head.

Parameters:

  • model_type (str) – String identifier stored on the base Model.

  • out_size (int) – Number of energy-grid points (output length).

  • max_z (int) – Maximum atomic number (inclusive).

  • atom_emb_dim (int) – Element embedding dimension.

  • atom_hidden_dim (int) – Hidden dimension in the equivariant encoder.

  • atom_layers (int) – Number of equivariant interaction blocks.

  • local_cutoff (float) – Message-passing cutoff radius in Angstrom.

  • rbf_dim (int) – Number of Gaussian RBF bases for local edge distances.

  • energy_rbf_dim (int) – Number of Gaussian RBF bases for energy embedding.

  • scatter_dim (int) – Intermediate scatter feature dimension for the path branch.

  • latent_dim (int) – Output dimension produced by each active branch.

  • head_hidden_dim (int) – Hidden dimension of the final head MLP and gated fusion MLPs.

  • e3nn_irreps (str) – Node irreps for the equivariant encoder (e.g. "32x0e+16x1o+8x2e").

  • e3nn_irreps_message (str) – Message irreps inside each interaction block.

  • e3nn_lmax (int) – Maximum l for spherical harmonics in the encoder.

  • out_mlp_layers (int) – Number of layers in the final head MLP.

  • use_invariant_branch (bool) – Enable the invariant absorber branch.

  • use_attention_branch (bool) – Enable the invariant atom-attention branch.

  • use_equivariant_branch (bool) – Enable the late equivariant absorber head.

  • use_eq_attention_branch (bool) – Enable the equivariant atom-attention branch.

  • use_conv_branch (bool) – Enable the invariant SchNet/PaiNN convolution branch.

  • use_eq_conv_branch (bool) – Enable the equivariant NequIP/MACE convolution branch.

  • use_path_branch (bool) – Enable the 3-body path-scattering branch.

  • fusion_mode (str) – Branch fusion strategy. "cat" preserves the existing concatenate-and-MLP head, while "gated" uses learned energy-conditioned soft gates before the final head.

  • residual_scale_init (float) – Initial value of learnable residual scales.

  • attention_heads (int) – Number of attention heads in attention branches.

  • attention_rbf_dim (int) – Number of RBF bases for attention-graph distances.

  • attention_lmax (int) – Maximum l for spherical harmonics in attention/conv branches.

  • attention_irreps (str) – Output irreps of equivariant attention/conv branches.

  • att_cutoff (float) – Attention-graph cutoff radius in Angstrom.

  • conv_use_gate (bool) – If True, use a PaiNN-style scalar gate in conv branches.

__init__(model_type, out_size, max_z, atom_emb_dim, atom_hidden_dim, atom_layers, local_cutoff, rbf_dim, energy_rbf_dim, scatter_dim, latent_dim, head_hidden_dim, e3nn_irreps, e3nn_irreps_message, e3nn_lmax, out_mlp_layers, use_invariant_branch, use_attention_branch, use_equivariant_branch, use_eq_attention_branch, use_conv_branch, use_eq_conv_branch, use_path_branch, residual_scale_init, attention_heads, attention_rbf_dim, attention_lmax, attention_irreps, att_cutoff, conv_use_gate=True, fusion_mode='cat')[source]¶

Initialize E3EE.

forward(x, mask, absorber_index, edge_src, edge_dst, edge_weight, edge_vec, att_dst, att_dist, att_vec, energies, path_j, path_k, path_r0j, path_r0k, path_rjk, path_cosangle, path_batch)[source]¶

Forward pass.

Parameters:

  • x (Tensor) – Atomic numbers (int64, padded), shape (B, N).

  • mask (Tensor) – Valid-atom mask, shape (B, N).

  • absorber_index (Tensor) – Absorber atom index per sample, shape (B,).

  • edge_src (Tensor) – Flat source indices into B*N, shape (E,).

  • edge_dst (Tensor) – Flat destination indices into B*N, shape (E,).

  • edge_weight (Tensor) – Edge lengths in Angstrom, shape (E,).

  • edge_vec (Tensor) – Edge displacement vectors in Angstrom, shape (E, 3).

  • att_dst (Tensor) – Flat destination indices into B*N (attention graph), shape (E_att,).

  • att_dist (Tensor) – Absorber-to-atom distances in Angstrom, shape (E_att,).

  • att_vec (Tensor) – Absorber-to-atom displacement vectors in Angstrom, shape (E_att, 3).

  • energies (Tensor) – Energy grid, shape (B, nE) (nE drives RBF embedding).

  • path_j (Tensor) – Flat j index into B*N, shape (P,).

  • path_k (Tensor) – Flat k index into B*N, shape (P,).

  • path_r0j (Tensor) – Absorber-to-j distance in Angstrom, shape (P,).

  • path_r0k (Tensor) – Absorber-to-k distance in Angstrom, shape (P,).

  • path_rjk (Tensor) – j-to-k distance in Angstrom, shape (P,).

  • path_cosangle (Tensor) – Cosine of the j-absorber-k angle, shape (P,).

  • path_batch (Tensor) – Batch index per path, shape (P,).

Return type:

Tensor

Returns:

Predicted XANES intensities of shape (B, nE).

init_weights(weights_init, bias_init, **kwargs)[source]¶

Initialize all Linear and Embedding weights.

Parameters:

  • weights_init (str) – Name of the weight initializer registered in WeightInitRegistry.

  • bias_init (str) – Name of the bias initializer registered in BiasInitRegistry.

  • **kwargs – Additional keyword arguments forwarded to the weight initializer factory.

Return type:

None

property signature: Config¶

Return model signature as a Config.

Submodules¶

xanesnet.models.e3ee.e3ee module¶

Absorber-centred E3-equivariant model (E3EE).

class xanesnet.models.e3ee.e3ee.E3EE(model_type, out_size, max_z, atom_emb_dim, atom_hidden_dim, atom_layers, local_cutoff, rbf_dim, energy_rbf_dim, scatter_dim, latent_dim, head_hidden_dim, e3nn_irreps, e3nn_irreps_message, e3nn_lmax, out_mlp_layers, use_invariant_branch, use_attention_branch, use_equivariant_branch, use_eq_attention_branch, use_conv_branch, use_eq_conv_branch, use_path_branch, residual_scale_init, attention_heads, attention_rbf_dim, attention_lmax, attention_irreps, att_cutoff, conv_use_gate=True, fusion_mode='cat')[source]¶

Bases: Model

Absorber-centred E3-equivariant model. Architecture: - Equivariant atom encoder (e3nn spherical harmonics message passing) - Branch 1 (optional): invariant absorber features + energy - Branch 2a (optional): energy-conditioned atom attention - Branch 2b (optional): energy-conditioned equivariant atom attention - Branch 2c (optional): energy-conditioned invariant convolution (SchNet/PaiNN-style) - Branch 2d (optional): energy-conditioned equivariant convolution (NequIP/MACE-style) - Branch 3 (optional): late equivariant absorber head - Branch 4 (optional): 3-body path scattering

Each optional branch produces a (B, nE, latent_dim) tensor. Active branches are fused according to fusion_mode: "cat" concatenates them before the final MLP head, while "gated" combines them with an energy-conditioned GatedBranchFusion before the final MLP head.

Parameters:

  • model_type (str) – String identifier stored on the base Model.

  • out_size (int) – Number of energy-grid points (output length).

  • max_z (int) – Maximum atomic number (inclusive).

  • atom_emb_dim (int) – Element embedding dimension.

  • atom_hidden_dim (int) – Hidden dimension in the equivariant encoder.

  • atom_layers (int) – Number of equivariant interaction blocks.

  • local_cutoff (float) – Message-passing cutoff radius in Angstrom.

  • rbf_dim (int) – Number of Gaussian RBF bases for local edge distances.

  • energy_rbf_dim (int) – Number of Gaussian RBF bases for energy embedding.

  • scatter_dim (int) – Intermediate scatter feature dimension for the path branch.

  • latent_dim (int) – Output dimension produced by each active branch.

  • head_hidden_dim (int) – Hidden dimension of the final head MLP and gated fusion MLPs.

  • e3nn_irreps (str) – Node irreps for the equivariant encoder (e.g. "32x0e+16x1o+8x2e").

  • e3nn_irreps_message (str) – Message irreps inside each interaction block.

  • e3nn_lmax (int) – Maximum l for spherical harmonics in the encoder.

  • out_mlp_layers (int) – Number of layers in the final head MLP.

  • use_invariant_branch (bool) – Enable the invariant absorber branch.

  • use_attention_branch (bool) – Enable the invariant atom-attention branch.

  • use_equivariant_branch (bool) – Enable the late equivariant absorber head.

  • use_eq_attention_branch (bool) – Enable the equivariant atom-attention branch.

  • use_conv_branch (bool) – Enable the invariant SchNet/PaiNN convolution branch.

  • use_eq_conv_branch (bool) – Enable the equivariant NequIP/MACE convolution branch.

  • use_path_branch (bool) – Enable the 3-body path-scattering branch.

  • fusion_mode (str) – Branch fusion strategy. "cat" preserves the existing concatenate-and-MLP head, while "gated" uses learned energy-conditioned soft gates before the final head.

  • residual_scale_init (float) – Initial value of learnable residual scales.

  • attention_heads (int) – Number of attention heads in attention branches.

  • attention_rbf_dim (int) – Number of RBF bases for attention-graph distances.

  • attention_lmax (int) – Maximum l for spherical harmonics in attention/conv branches.

  • attention_irreps (str) – Output irreps of equivariant attention/conv branches.

  • att_cutoff (float) – Attention-graph cutoff radius in Angstrom.

  • conv_use_gate (bool) – If True, use a PaiNN-style scalar gate in conv branches.

__init__(model_type, out_size, max_z, atom_emb_dim, atom_hidden_dim, atom_layers, local_cutoff, rbf_dim, energy_rbf_dim, scatter_dim, latent_dim, head_hidden_dim, e3nn_irreps, e3nn_irreps_message, e3nn_lmax, out_mlp_layers, use_invariant_branch, use_attention_branch, use_equivariant_branch, use_eq_attention_branch, use_conv_branch, use_eq_conv_branch, use_path_branch, residual_scale_init, attention_heads, attention_rbf_dim, attention_lmax, attention_irreps, att_cutoff, conv_use_gate=True, fusion_mode='cat')[source]¶

Initialize E3EE.

forward(x, mask, absorber_index, edge_src, edge_dst, edge_weight, edge_vec, att_dst, att_dist, att_vec, energies, path_j, path_k, path_r0j, path_r0k, path_rjk, path_cosangle, path_batch)[source]¶

Forward pass.

Parameters:

  • x (Tensor) – Atomic numbers (int64, padded), shape (B, N).

  • mask (Tensor) – Valid-atom mask, shape (B, N).

  • absorber_index (Tensor) – Absorber atom index per sample, shape (B,).

  • edge_src (Tensor) – Flat source indices into B*N, shape (E,).

  • edge_dst (Tensor) – Flat destination indices into B*N, shape (E,).

  • edge_weight (Tensor) – Edge lengths in Angstrom, shape (E,).

  • edge_vec (Tensor) – Edge displacement vectors in Angstrom, shape (E, 3).

  • att_dst (Tensor) – Flat destination indices into B*N (attention graph), shape (E_att,).

  • att_dist (Tensor) – Absorber-to-atom distances in Angstrom, shape (E_att,).

  • att_vec (Tensor) – Absorber-to-atom displacement vectors in Angstrom, shape (E_att, 3).

  • energies (Tensor) – Energy grid, shape (B, nE) (nE drives RBF embedding).

  • path_j (Tensor) – Flat j index into B*N, shape (P,).

  • path_k (Tensor) – Flat k index into B*N, shape (P,).

  • path_r0j (Tensor) – Absorber-to-j distance in Angstrom, shape (P,).

  • path_r0k (Tensor) – Absorber-to-k distance in Angstrom, shape (P,).

  • path_rjk (Tensor) – j-to-k distance in Angstrom, shape (P,).

  • path_cosangle (Tensor) – Cosine of the j-absorber-k angle, shape (P,).

  • path_batch (Tensor) – Batch index per path, shape (P,).

Return type:

Tensor

Returns:

Predicted XANES intensities of shape (B, nE).

init_weights(weights_init, bias_init, **kwargs)[source]¶

Initialize all Linear and Embedding weights.

Parameters:

  • weights_init (str) – Name of the weight initializer registered in WeightInitRegistry.

  • bias_init (str) – Name of the bias initializer registered in BiasInitRegistry.

  • **kwargs – Additional keyword arguments forwarded to the weight initializer factory.

Return type:

None

property signature: Config¶

Return model signature as a Config.
